questionHtml: Suggest how, if at all, the estimated mean and estimated median reaction times will change if the errors are corrected. Justify your response.
markschemeHtml:
the mean will increase         A1

because the incorrect reaction times are moving from a lower interval to a higher interval which will increase the numerator of the mean calculation         R1

 

the median will stay the same         A1

because the median or middle of the data is greater than both intervals being changed         R1

 

Note: Do not award A1R0.

 

[4 marks]

meta.title: Suggest how, if at all, the estimated mean and estimated median reaction times will change if the errors are corrected. Justify your response.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.3—Mean, median, mode. Mean of grouped data, standard deviation. Quartiles, IQR
